description: Active-run anomaly KPI totals for the selected scope.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH active_stage AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM featurestore:merged_anomaly_processing_manifest_v2 m
  JOIN featurestore:merged_anomaly_stage_summary_v2 s
    ON s.processing_run_id = m.active_run_id
   AND s.name = m.name
   AND s.stage_num_td = m.stage_num_td
   AND s.algorithm_version = m.algorithm_version
  WHERE m.status = 'active'
    AND m.algorithm_version = 'ds-v1'
    AND m.fleet_name = :fleet_name
    AND m.pad_name = :pad_name
    AND (
      COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
      OR m.name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
    )
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS total_wells,
  COUNT(*) AS total_stages,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN total_anomaly_lines > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS stages_with_anomaly,
  COALESCE(SUM(total_anomaly_lines), 0) AS total_anomaly_lines,
  COALESCE(SUM(pressure_surge_lines), 0) AS pressure_surge_lines,
  COALESCE(SUM(pump_rate_drop_lines), 0) AS pump_rate_drop_lines,
  COALESCE(SUM(mid_stage_shutdown_lines), 0) AS mid_stage_shutdown_lines,
  COALESCE(SUM(sweep_lines), 0) AS sweep_lines
FROM active_stage
) q
